channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Uneven footpath is a trip hazard, 10th April
item.description:
Footpath at the rear of The Close access adjacent to 48 The Covert is uneven in places and a trip hazard, particularly at night as there's very little lighting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Covert, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two high walls have been built which changes the look from all the houses n the plans submitted, 9th April
item.description:
Looking at the plans there are two walls built that are different from all the houses n the plans submitted One next to the neighbour n one by beaulieu avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Markwell Close, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden cabinet, 9th April
item.description:
Wooden cabinet on Albatross Way by bike rack, please remove asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albatross Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite Bloomsbury park on Bloomsbury way near number 4, called HQ, 9th April
item.description:
Opposite Bloomsbury park on Bloomsbury way, I think Light number 7 or 8, not working and area is now very dark
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20-21, Bloomsbury Way, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned e-bikes in and around Beckett Walk and Kent House Rd., 9th April
item.description:
Several abandoned e-bikes in and around Beckett Walk and Kent House Rd. at the junction with Lennard Road. A combination of Forest and Lime bikes.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckett Walk, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light outside museum st cafe little russell st, 9th April
item.description:
Street Light I think number 5 not working on Little russell street, it's the one outside the cafe and opposite Organic Botanist, stopped working from maybe today, area is a hotspot for ASB so pls attend urgently
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Little Russell Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of litter/rubbish, 9th April
item.description:
Loads of litter/rubbish around Spa Car park area adjoining Turners Meadow Way near Beckenham Library. It's been like this for over 6 months and is well overdue a major cleanup as I spotted a rat near there the other day which is is an environmental health hazard, especially as children are living in houses nearby and use the Spa facilities for swimming etc. The litter is around the edge of the car park as well as near entrance - all stuck in the bushes. They need bins!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Biffa truck at 23:10, 9th April
item.description:
Biffa truck collecting commercial rubbish, beeping and flashing lights whilst parked in a residential road after 23:00 at night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Haddon Grove, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Irregular road, 9th April
item.description:
Irregular road in front of Dover Patrol bus stop makes the whole house shake when heavy vehicles and buses drive by, especially heavier battery powered buses.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dover Patrol, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole about 12inches across, 9th April
item.description:
The pothole has been here for a while
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crescent Drive, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still one roll of carpet on footpath despite council informing that issue was replaced., 9th April
item.description:
Precisely reported. Received email that issue investigated and resolved yet one roll of carpet remains. Issue not resolved.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car dumped, incorrectly parked, blocking my neighbours drive access, 9th April
item.description:
Car dumped, incorrectly parked, blocking my neighbours drive access

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van has been left for weeks. Blocking viability on the turning., 9th April
item.description:
Van has been left for weeks. Blocking viability on the turning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress, 9th April
item.description:
Left on the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, Jerningham Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and chair, 9th April
item.description:
These have been left there since last Friday (good Friday)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pendrell Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant problems with rubbish on Grove Lane, 9th April
item.description:
We swept outside 4-6 Grove Lane this morning and this is what it looks like 6 hours later. Please provide more street bins and move green bins off street which are constantly overflowing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bins are full, 9th April
item.description:
There is 4 bins for animal waste and the are full and as it’s around the playground where the children supposed to play they really stinks and it will be very helpful if someone can take care of them please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Around a 10” pot hole, 9th April
item.description:
I have noticed the bump going right across this part of the road but this hole here is getting deeper. The whole road need to be resurfaced where the hole is.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merryfield, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture dumped, 9th April
item.description:
Outside 1-8 peacock street by bins this has been here for about 3 days now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41-48, Peacock Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Swan mead 10-30 first floor back of staircase, 9th April
item.description:
We found the graffiti first floor of this building on back of staircase please paint it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swan Mead, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
